title: Strict-rules configuration strips the literal script element before persistence
repro: Create QA-B2 AI Tool in /admin-next with rules text containing literal <script>alert(1)</script>
Deliver and claim the strict-rules item
expected: Modal displays the complete configured rules text and Svelte renders the literal script element as inert text
actual: Modal and both product/selection DB snapshots contain only alert(1); the <script> and </script> text is removed before persistence, so the mandated inert-render contract is not met
suspected: src/utils/upgradeOptions.ts:50 normalizeStrictRulesText calls normalizePlainText; the explicit normalization test expects <script> tags to be stripped rather than carried as inert text

title: Credential and activation-link plaintext is written to backend logs
repro: Save fulfillment credentials or deliver an activation link in /admin-next
expected: Credentials are encrypted at rest and never emitted to logs
actual: Backend log prints updates.credentials_encrypted with the complete activation URL including token-FIRST-SECRET and token-SECOND-SECRET; the same logging path covers saved credentials
suspected: src/services/subscriptionService.ts:796 Logger.info('Admin updating subscription', { subscriptionId, updates }) logs sensitive updates before storage encryption

title: Include expired toggle cannot display an unused expired coupon returned by create
repro: Create a coupon in /admin-next/coupons with an already-past start/end window
Observe HTTP 201 and the coupon row present in PostgreSQL
expected: Coupon is hidden by default and becomes visible when Include expired is enabled
actual: The coupon remains hidden even with the toggle enabled because the server-loaded coupon collection excludes it; PostgreSQL still contains the row
suspected: frontend/src/routes/admin-next/coupons/+page.server.ts calls admin.listCoupons without an include-expired option, so +page.svelte cannot reveal a row absent from data.coupons
